cap: A disaggregated KV-cache storage engine for LLM inference: a C++ client writes large KV tensors into daemon-owned POSIX shared memory over a Unix domain socket, and a Go daemon indexes, checksums, and serves them locally or over a custom P2P TCP protocol with gRPC-based cluster membership and consistent-hash routing.

Automated bug-localization and repair pipeline for Java (Defects4J) and SWE-bench tasks: locates buggy methods/lines using stack traces, issue text, and custom bytecode-instrumentation debug recorders, then prompts an LLM to generate a patch and evaluates it.

An event-sourced 'memory firewall' for coding-agent memory stores: an authority/provenance/freshness-gated append-only claim-event log with hash-chain integrity, that rejects low-authority overrides and replays why a fact was believed.

A TypeScript/Node CLI+desktop runtime that runs JavaScript 'dynamic workflow' scripts which fan out and orchestrate multiple coding-agent CLIs (Codex, Claude Code, Gemini, Qwen, Kimi) via injected `agent()`/`parallel()`/`pipeline()` primitives, outside any single host agent's context.
AI-themed fortune-telling web app that takes a user question, calls the Kimi LLM API via a Supabase edge function, and renders a styled multi-section reading with persisted history.
a released ASR model plus inference/download scripts for transcribing speech robustly under noise, far-field, and distortion conditions.

a local-only static webpage that reads and writes Claude Code / Codex CLI / OpenCode config files (settings.json, config.toml, auth.json) via the browser File System Access API, letting users switch between named model/auth profiles without hand-editing JSON/TOML

a security operations dashboard that aggregates CVE/threat-intel feeds, auto-blocks malicious IPs via Alibaba Cloud WAF based on request-frequency/reputation rules, detects phishing emails with a trained ML classifier, and exposes an AI chatbot

a LangGraph pipeline that ingests PDF/DOCX/TXT documents, uses DeepSeek/Minmax LLMs to extract content and write a short-drama script, generates storyboard-driven HyperFrames HTML animations, and renders them to 1080x1920 vertical MP4 via a headless Edge browser

FastAPI+LangGraph service that fetches a GitHub repo's metadata/README/tree/source snapshot, runs three sequential LLM agents (code auditor, product-value analyst, judge) and streams progress/results to a Vue frontend via SSE, with Redis result caching

Go control-plane binary that clusters multiple machines into a private LLM-serving mesh: distributes/shards large models across nodes, routes OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible requests to the best available engine/node, and prints ready-to-paste config for connecting Claude Code, Cursor, Aider, and a dozen other clients.
multi-agent (indicator/pattern/trend/decision) LangGraph pipeline that reads OHLCV data, generates annotated K-line chart images, and produces LONG/SHORT trade directives via vision-capable LLMs

a macOS Electron desktop app that runs Claude Code and Codex as local CLI subprocesses in a chat-first UI, with a protected 'Kernel' core and a self-modifying 'Userland' UI surface that an agent (Modify) can edit live with diff-gated review and rollback

single static Go binary exposing a stateless, one-command-per-invocation JSON debugger CLI (breakpoints, stack, eval, locals) wrapping the Debug Adapter Protocol for Python/Go/Java, plus an MCP server exposing the same commands as agent tools

Claude Code plugin installing 45 named subagents across six teams plus a shared research pipeline, wired to a knowledge graph (Cognee) and a code-structure graph (Graphify) via pre-tool hooks that route reads to the cheapest knowledge surface
Go CLI/daemon personal agent with ReAct+plan-execute loop, pluggable skills (SKILL.md) and cron-style workflows (WORKFLOW.md) chaining them, shell/file/web/memory tools, Telegram adapter

Chinese enterprise agent-orchestration studio: visual DAG flow editor (cyclic graphs), multi-agent role/chatroom coordination, RAG (text/table KB), MCP client integration, unit/flow test generation, and training-corpus production, backed by a FastAPI+SQLAlchemy server and Vue editor UI.
end-to-end chatbot reference stack that logs every LLM inference call (provider, latency, tokens) through Kafka into Postgres, visualized via Grafana dashboards

npm CLI that rewrites Claude Code's settings.json env block to point ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL/model IDs at alternate providers (DeepSeek, MiniMax, Kimi, Qwen, GLM, etc.), with per-provider thinking/effort capability mapping and saved credential profiles

macOS menubar app that periodically screenshots the active window/app/URL, extracts rich context (browser URL, Spotify track, VS Code workspace) via native providers, and uses an LLM to classify events into a daily timeline, project-progress milestones, and 'addiction' tracking, exposed to other agents through a bundled MCP server.

A multiprocess batch runner that drives an LLM-based patch-generation and patch-selection loop over SWE-bench-style coding issues, using pluggable LLM API clients (Anthropic, OpenAI, DeepSeek, OpenRouter) and bash/edit/search tool implementations, then analyzes failure trajectories against top-agent successes.
CLI/MCP tool and library that packs a repo (local or remote git) into a single AI-friendly file with tree-sitter-based code compression, token counting, secret scanning, and git-diff-aware output
MCP server exposing the Raindrop.io bookmarking API (collections, bookmarks, tags, highlights, export) as tools for AI assistants over stdio
a GUI grounding/planning model (with training pipeline) that maps natural-language instructions to precise on-screen click targets for GUI agents.

An Electron desktop app plus Rust runtime binary and a large bundled corpus of Claude-Code-style agent personas, hooks, and safety rules (e.g. blocking rm -rf, prompt-injection, pipe-to-shell) marketed as a 'Personal Agent OS' for Claude Code.

a Python CLI/MCP tool (`umem`) that stores short-term (project) and long-term (global) memory facts locally, auto-syncs them into native agent instruction files (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .cursor/rules/), and promotes recurring task patterns into portable Agent Skills synced across multiple runtime targets

Responsive web UI (React frontend + Express/Socket.IO backend) that wraps the Qwen Code CLI, giving browser-based chat, file explorer, and an embedded terminal (node-pty) for remote AI-assisted coding sessions.
LangGraph multi-agent research pipeline (planner, researcher with search/scrape tools, analyzer, reporter) with a websocket API and short/long-term agent memory.
Claude Code skill that interviews the user (username, bio, stack, style) then generates a styled GitHub profile README from one of six templates with pluggable stat/badge/animation components
Local proxy server that translates OpenAI-format API requests into Ollama calls, letting any OpenAI-client app run against local open-source models.

Web platform (C# backend + provisioned Postgres) that converts recorded/dictated conversations into structured requirement->spec->code artifacts, locks approved specs, and detects implementation drift against them, with local Whisper speech-to-text.
A multi-agent reinforcement learning research codebase (custom learners/controllers/mixers) built on the PyMARL/SMAC StarCraft II benchmark, targeting low-latency communication between agents.

Python multi-agent framework with 5 fixed roles (Coordinator/Planner/Coder/Reviewer/Memorizer) that pair coders with reviewers for module-level review loops, plus a memory system (digest→wiki merge, keyword+jieba search) and a pluggable graph-memory backend (file/Kuzu/Neo4j/FalkorDB)
An MCP proxy that intercepts oversized tool-call responses, stores full content in SQLite, and returns the model a compact preview plus an on-demand expand_content handle.

an agent that autonomously picks model/hyperparameter configs for sparse-feedback graph classification and recommendation tasks, reads past results, and decides the next experiment or when to stop, within a fixed budget
Java SDK wrapping ByteDance Coze agent platform's chat-completion and workflow APIs behind a session-factory interface
Adds a Kalman-filter motion-aware memory module on top of Meta's SAM 2 to do zero-shot visual object tracking in video without additional training.

A Dockerized platform combining a LangGraph-based interview-simulation agent (multi-round mock interviews with resume-grounded follow-ups, voice via Doubao TTS/DashScope ASR) with a document-ingesting RAG knowledge base for technical-interview prep content.

hosted AI-agent chat platform supporting LLM API access plus one-click import of Coze/Dify agent workflows, with an admin backend, credit-based payment/monetization, and usage logging so builders can sell access to agents without exposing their workflow internals

LangGraph-based 28-node stock research workflow for Chinese A-share ETFs: parallel technical/fundamental/policy/sentiment analysts, conditional bull/bear debate loop (max 3 rounds), risk-gated human-in-the-loop approval, backtesting engine, and MCP integration to 258 Tushare financial data tools.
ThinkPHP8-based low-code admin framework with online code generation from annotated controller methods, RBAC, WeChat/Alipay payment SDK integration, and a generic admin UI builder.
Minimal ~200-line TypeScript CLI coding agent with read_file/list_files/edit_file tools calling OpenAI, intentionally excluding a bash tool for safety.
A multi-service RAG chatbot: OCR+PDF parsing (magic-pdf) feeding chunked text into Milvus vector DB, with a FastAPI backend for insert/search/RAG-query endpoints and a Vue frontend

LLM multi-agent simulation platform (5 prompt-engineered agents: strong/weak party, mediator, domestic audience, evaluator) running an 8-step negotiation state machine to test bias-mediation hypotheses from the Camp David Accords, with a full statistics pipeline (ANOVA, Cox survival, bootstrap mediation) over the results
wraps ByteDance's UI-TARS VLM CLI as an OpenClaw skill so a coding agent can drive desktop GUI actions (screenshot->VLM decision->click/type loop) via JSON-lines output

OpenClaw (WeCom/企业微信) channel plugin routing chat between WeCom Bot-WebSocket and Agent API transports, with per-user/group context isolation, streaming replies, media relay, and tool-exposed access to WeCom docs/calendar.

Terminal-native coding-agent CLI (disco) that streams DeepSeek responses, executes a tool loop (bash/edit/patch/grep), supports configurable MCP servers, loadable skills, and resumable run logs with session snapshots.

a FastAPI+Vue+LangGraph multi-agent TCM (traditional Chinese medicine) consultation system integrating a fine-tuned DeepSeek TCM model and GraphRAG retrieval over classical texts/case records for diagnosis and herb recommendations.

config-driven multi-agent platform (Supervisor/Analyst/Developer personas) that collaborates via a FAISS-backed RAG context store to autonomously design, code, test, and document small software projects from a handful of templates, built from scratch after the author found Microsoft's AutoGen framework limiting.

Cross-IDE/cross-runtime multi-agent task-control framework: task cards routed to Worker/Reviewer/Verifier roles with ownership, scope-audit, and result-report gating, backed by an MCP tool server and dependency-free sandboxed tool wrappers (shell/git/test/lint).

terminal coding agent CLI tuned for DeepSeek-V4 models, with plan/agent/yolo modes, MCP client, SKILL.md workflow support, sub-agent spawning, session save/restore, workspace rollback snapshots, and an HTTP/SSE server runtime
curated list of machine-learning courses, textbooks (PDFs), and two old TensorFlow example scripts (MNIST softmax, Chinese character recognition CNN)

a SaaS platform where a conversational agent calls 13 tools against the MiniMax API to generate music, lyrics, covers, TTS, and voice clones, with dual-credit billing (auto-deduct/refund), an admin backend, and a generated-asset library

A Rust AI companion storing typed, Bayesian-confidence-scored 'beliefs' with evidence trails and contradiction edges in a custom graph DB (YantrikDB), with multi-LLM routing, an agentic Claude-Code-driven coder tool, sandboxed code execution, persistent recipe-based task delegation, and parallel ReAct sub-agents for research.

embeddable memory engine (Rust core, Python/WASM bindings, MCP server) doing vector recall via HNSW, knowledge-graph relations, temporal decay, and contradiction detection, with a consolidation step (`think()`) and swappable embedders.

drop-in memory-provider plugin for Hermes Agent backed by YantrikDB, adding contradiction tracking, recency-aware reinforcement ranking, explainable recall reasons, proactive hygiene, and agent-authored skills with an outcome ledger

Cognitive memory engine (Rust server + Python client/MCP layer) that stores agent memories with temporal decay, contradiction detection, and consolidation ('think()'/'dreaming'), served via embeddable library, HTTP cluster (raft-replicated), or MCP server, with an entity graph and personality-derivation layer on top.

An MCP server that shells out to `gopls` (Go's language server) to expose GoToDefinition, FindReferences, Diagnostics, Hover, Rename, FindImplementers, symbol search/listing, and format/organize-imports as MCP tools.
Full-stack template combining RAG document QA, a 3-role multi-agent pipeline, and a drag-and-drop DAG workflow builder with SSE streaming and a LoRA fine-tuning entry point.

Vision-and-language navigation research code implementing a Room-and-Object Aware Scene Perceiver that predicts room/object types from CLIP features to support an LLM-driven navigation planner (LLM component itself not released).

single-binary Go runtime that runs LLM/CLI-agent/pure-code 'hooks' around request handling, with data models, REST API generation, MCP tool support, sandboxed CLI-agent execution (Claude Code/OpenCode/Codex in containers with VNC), and built-in vector/graph search

Cross-platform serial-port debugging suite (CLI + egui GUI) with Modbus/CAN/I2C-SPI protocol decoding, script record/replay, STM32/ESP32 flashing, and a built-in MCP server exposing 15 tools so an AI agent can drive/inspect serial hardware directly.
a self-hosted CMS/pipeline that generates AI content, RAG-chunks a knowledge base, and auto-publishes to WordPress and multiple channels for SEO/GEO optimization.

A library of 20 Claude/Codex Skill packages implementing Generative-Engine-Optimization (SEO-for-AI-answers) workflows: page audits, brand knowledge graphs, comparison/explainer content builders, and AI-search monitoring, each with triggers, eval cases, and rendered example deliverables (docx/html/pdf).
CLI + Python scripts that create, compile (to OpenAI/Claude/generic targets), evaluate, and govern reusable 'agent skill' packages, with a large battery of report/evidence generators.
Self-hostable multi-agent chat platform with sub-agent collaboration, RAG knowledge bases, MCP server integration/generation, and a tiered short/summary/long-term memory system.
A LangGraph-based fitness coaching agent that runs a Plan/Act/Reflect/Adjust loop over carb-cycling diet plans, ingests food photos via a vision LLM, and generates weekly AI progress reports.

NoneBot QQ/group-chat plugin where a LangChain agent decides when/how to reply, using tools for web search, RAG-backed chat history recall, group-culture profile summarization, and emoji/meme learning via vector search on images.

TypeScript CLI coding agent (npm global install) that reads/searches a repo, proposes diffs, gates shell commands behind confirmation, runs tests, and targets DeepSeek V4 models with an eval/benchmark suite for cost and TDD-loop latency.

Rust multi-agent framework with MCP client/hub, pgvector/Apache AGE memory, and a markdown-defined 'horde' sub-agent orchestration layer (horde.md + agents/*.md) that delegates tasks to worker agents with progress/artifact reporting.

A local macOS daemon+CLI that lets an AI agent observe and control the desktop via GPU-accelerated OCR/screen tokenization plus click/type/wait primitives, with selector-first automation and stable JSON contracts.

Rust GPT-2 (124M) inference engine for Apple Silicon with hand-written Metal compute kernels (tiled matmul, MHA, layernorm, RoPE, GELU), a byte-level BPE tokenizer, and CPU reference implementations verified bit-for-bit against HuggingFace transformers.

Bun-based open-source SWE-agent CLI (published as npm `supercode`) with a tool system (file read/write/edit, command exec, search, web search, subagent delegate), permission manager, device-code OAuth, a Next.js dashboard/docs site, and a companion project fine-tuning open Qwen3/GLM-4 models for coding.

A carbon-aware LLM inference gateway/router that scores and routes requests across self-hosted models (Llama/Mistral/Phi3 on vLLM) using a weighted formula enforcing a minimum energy-weight floor, with a prompt optimizer, carbon/cost dashboards, billing, and full k8s/Terraform deploy infra.

MCP server wrapping ~125 offensive-security CLI tools (nmap, impacket, hashcat, sliver C2, kubedagger eBPF k8s attacks, UEFI bootkit sim) behind a Go MCP protocol layer with multi-transport, caching, audit logging, and installer profiles
Multi-layer persona platform with typed YAML memory stores, rule-based frontier/mid/small model routing, sandboxed tool execution, and Discord/Slack/Telegram connectors

Go-native agent framework with OTel-native observability (embedded SQLite trace store + web dashboard in one binary), a directed-graph runtime with checkpoints/interrupts, ReAct/Plan-Execute agent helpers, first-party MCP client+server, and first-party A2A client+server

A Rust-core agentic framework (graph executor with append-only journal and exactly-once crash replay) exposed via a C ABI to Go/Python/TypeScript/.NET/Java bindings, with an MCP tool server, Ed25519-signed A2A agent cards, ABAC policy engine, and an air-gap egress-blocking mode.

autonomous Rust coding agent with a streaming ReAct orchestrator, a multi-agent swarm (Planner→Coder→Tester→Reviewer via tokio DAG), a vector-indexed semantic code search (BarqDB), a TrustTier permission gate (ReadOnly/CodeModify/Shell/Full) that cannot be bypassed by interactive approval, LSP/VS Code integration, and 13 pluggable LLM providers

A minimal Linux+musl/BusyBox appliance OS that boots directly into a Rust-based local LLM agent (llama.cpp inference) fronted by a Go HTTP gateway, with per-service cgroup/seccomp-BPF/Landlock confinement and an append-only hash-chained provenance journal.
a Rust agent runtime with 10 LLM provider backends, 13 built-in tool integrations, guardrails (PII/prompt-injection detection), memory strategies, and an HTTP server with SSE streaming

Go library for building stateful LLM agents on Postgres/MySQL with transactional Run(), tool registry, streaming, hooks, and automatic context compaction (summarization + token-budget partitioning) via the Anthropic SDK

Go daemon providing an append-only SQLite event log, SSE plane, and MCP channel that broker messages between a long-running Claude session and a human, with a fail-closed edit gate blocking agent writes until human response

ultra-lightweight native C++ coding/chat agent runtime with a WebUI, XML-tag-based tool/CS instruction protocol, streaming responses, session/memory persistence, and Python-CLI tool bridging (no heavy framework dependency)

A local runtime server exposing HTTP/WebSocket APIs so a mobile app can host and control coding agents (bash/editor/web-search tools, Anthropic and OpenAI backends), browse/edit the filesystem, run a terminal, and launch/monitor background cloud coding jobs against GitHub repos with PIN-based pairing security.
a macOS menu-bar app that transcribes both sides of a call locally and surfaces suggestions pulled from the user's own notes in real time.
MCP server plus portable agent skill that lets AI agents create/edit/export diagrams on a live Excalidraw canvas via real-time sync.

Multi-agent blog-writing pipeline that sequentially runs Title, Outline, Content, Image-Analyzer, and Merger agents via an orchestrator, streaming progress to the frontend over SSE and sourcing images from Pexels/Mermaid/Iconify/SVG.

FastAPI app that computes traditional Chinese fortune-telling charts (BaZi, ZiWei, QiMen) deterministically, then runs a 4-round LLM pipeline (pattern ID, cross-validation, yearly forecast, personalized paths) over multiple swappable model backends

Cross-agent desktop-pet overlay (Node/Electron) that listens on a local protocol for agent lifecycle events (idle/running/waiting/failed/review) via hooks/plugins per coding-agent CLI, and animates a status companion accordingly.

Obsidian desktop plugin providing a chat panel that drives Claude Code/Claude SDK against a Vault: manages attachments, pinned context, permission approvals for external file reads, session history, and native tool-execution handoff to the CLI/SDK.
Rust framework for defining and running git-repo-scoped AI agents with subagent loading, tool execution, sandboxing, session/audit logging, and optional voice control across multiple model providers

A Rust-based coding-agent CLI/runner built for tmux-native execution with reviewed-plan interviews, durable verification, and a mobile notifications SDK (Telegram) for remote check-ins on running agent sessions.

OpenCode/Claude Code plugin exposing a persistent Python REPL, notebook writer/search, and checkpoint tools driven by a 4-agent cast (Planner/Coder/Adversarial-Reviewer/Report-Writer) that turns research goals into reproducible Jupyter notebooks with hypothesis/finding markers

Claude Code plugin adding a multi-agent orchestration layer (specialist agents: architect/debugger/security-reviewer/etc.), slash commands (/autopilot, /omc-teams), a status HUD, model routing, delegation enforcement, and benchmark harnesses scoring agent output against ground truth

An npm-installed toolkit that layers 30+ agent slash-command prompts, workflow skills, MCP servers (state/memory/notepad), and native-config generation on top of the OpenAI Codex CLI, plus Rust helper crates for tmux muxing and API access.
CLI that parses a Docker-like 'Agentfile' DSL (AGENT/MCP_SERVER/CHAIN directives) and generates a runnable Python agent + Dockerfile targeting FastAgent or Agno frameworks.

Playwright-driven iterative web-search agent that decomposes a query, runs concurrent searches across 6 engines, crawls and interacts with pages (auto-clicking 'read more'), and synthesizes a cited answer, looping until evidence is sufficient.

web chat UI that decomposes a user question into a Manager-planned pool of parallel LLM 'expert' roles, recursively reviews/revises their drafts, then synthesizes a final answer, with live visualization of the reasoning graph

Claude Code plugin that fans a diff out to seven parallel reviewers (Codex GPT-5.5, Gemini 3.1 Pro, five Claude specialist subagents including one 'blind' reviewer with no intent context) and synthesizes a deduplicated, code-verified severity report.

a long-form Chinese-language book surveying agentic AI: reasoning/memory/tools/multi-agent architectures, RLHF/evaluation, framework comparisons, and an 'Agentic Coding' chapter on Claude Code-style harnesses

A book/guide dissecting agent harness engineering (runtime, tools, memory, orchestration, MCP, security) using Codex/Claude Code/OpenClaw as reference systems, plus a from-scratch teaching implementation (MiniHarness) covering agent loop, tool registry, memory consolidation, and permission/sandbox layers.

A structured multi-chapter book (markdown) teaching setup, internals (Gateway, Agent Loop, memory), and production ops for the OpenClaw personal AI assistant, plus small Python tooling to validate links/build PDF/mobile reader.

a mobile app + backend + terminal agent letting a phone remote-control a PC via an LLM-driven computer-use agent (clicks, types, terminal, window management) with a heuristic prompt-injection/PII filter layer
VS Code (VSCodium) fork with an added Q3 Agent sidebar/service that talks to a local Ollama Qwen3-Coder model for chat, inline FIM completions, and approval-gated file/terminal tool calls
A markdown prompt encoding one developer's strict coding/testing/workflow discipline (Elegant Objects, SOLID, TDD, git conventions) meant to be fed to an AI coding agent as a system prompt.
argparse CLI that sends a prompt plus a mode-specific system prompt (coding/studying/summarising) to the Kimi 2.6 chat-completions API and prints the response
NoneBot (QQ bot) plugin giving a chat bot web-search, URL-content extraction, and Baidu-Baike lookup abilities, routed to one of several Chinese/OpenAI LLM backends.
Cross-platform command-and-control framework (Rust implant, Go server, Vue3 UI) that integrates the MCP protocol so an AI agent can drive red-team automation.

multi-surface (CLI/Web/TUI) fiction-writing tool that generates novel drafts from a theme or continues from existing chapters, scores foreshadowing recovery, and tracks longform project state, kept in sync across surfaces via a shared 'mode parity' command contract

A folder convention plus Project Instructions that make Claude Cowork read/write decisions, open questions, and next-actions as Markdown files before and after each task, with 10 scheduled recurring-task prompt templates.

an Android app that embeds a CPython runtime (Chaquopy) alongside a cloud-LLM chat loop, letting the model dispatch native Android Intents (email, alarms, notifications) and run local Python scripts from an on-device chat interface.

personal monorepo of dozens of independent AI/agent practice projects spanning RAG pipelines, multi-agent team frameworks, browser-automation job-application bots, and several from-scratch coding-agent harness prototypes

AI-driven recruitment management system: LangGraph ReAct agent with 15 tools (7 query + 4 write, confirmation-gated) over resume parsing, job/candidate matching, AI interview generation, and a BI dashboard.

a personal grab-bag of scripts and notebooks covering MLOps practices: SageMaker/Lambda deployment, DVC, Kubernetes, Spark, vector DBs, and LLM topics like RAG, function calling, and a document-oriented agent

A Go MCP server wrapping the Hevy workout-tracking REST API, exposing 22 tools (workouts, routines, exercise templates, body measurements) over stdio or a multi-user streamable-HTTP transport secured by a full OAuth 2.1 flow that wraps each user's Hevy API key in a signed/encrypted bearer token.

Google-ADK multi-agent graph (intake, verification, dedup, routing, escalation, resolution, insight) that turns a citizen photo/voice report into a routed municipal case, auto-escalates on a deadline ladder, and closes the case only after vision-comparing before/after repair photos

an MCP server that splits source files into a per-function skeleton + body cache (.splinter/), letting a coding agent load/search individual function bodies instead of whole files, with durable per-file markdown memory and a watcher that re-splits on source changes

A curated index/navigation repo for Tencent's Intelligent Penetration Hackathon: winning teams' slide decks, official API/MCP docs for the competition platform, and links to the top 20 teams' open-source autonomous-penetration-agent repositories, plus a small MCP client script for the event's own agent forum.

Neovim plugin that turns the editor into a Cursor-like AI IDE: an in-editor agent loop with file/bash/grep tools, repo-map generation via tree-sitter, and an ACP bridge to run external CLI agents (Claude Code/Gemini/Codex) inside Neovim's UI.
an installable Claude/agent-skill bundle of architectural guidance (four-layer architecture, WebView survival guide, ship audit) for building native-feeling cross-platform desktop apps.

autonomous CTF-solving agent that plans, calls tools (analyze_file, web_request, exec_python, exec_command) inside a Docker sandbox in a ReAct loop, and records solve/fail experiences for future reuse

Continuous-action PPO trainer with 10 stabilization tricks (advantage/state/reward normalization, orthogonal init, etc.) applied to a custom multi-agent particle environment simulating drone/ground-vehicle swarm coordination tasks.

CLI + MCP server that statically analyzes codebases across 15+ languages via tree-sitter to detect dead code, near-duplicate code clones (via AST tree-edit-distance, MinHash/LSH, semantic embeddings), and AI-scaffolding artifacts, with SARIF/JSON output and CI diff-scoped gating.

Electron desktop client + Go/Vue admin backend enterprise AI platform: hosts MCP servers in per-client sandboxes, does human-confirmed ReAct tool calls, drives computer-use agents (Claude Sonnet, CogAgent, UI-TARS, OpenAI computer-use) for RPA, and renders dynamic MCP-driven forms/canvases.

A library of reusable prompt-skills (SKILL.md files) plus validation scripts that guide an agent to design AGENTS.md, boundaries, CI gates, runtime evidence bundles, and delivery records for an existing repo.

11 specialized LLM-driven agents (perceiver, analyst, responder, etc.) coordinated by a Go DAG scheduler using Kahn's topological sort, with checkpoint/rollback and a SHA256 tamper-evident audit chain gating actions by risk tier

A FastAPI-based multi-agent orchestration system (health-insurance customer service domain) using LangGraph, with intent routing, subagent dispatch, MCP tool integration, human-approval gating, and a task-completion verification/evidence pipeline.

A Go server that reads a Pi coding agent's session JSONL files, streams live updates to a browser PWA via SSE/fsnotify, spawns per-session pi --mode rpc chat workers, and auto-publishes remote HTTPS access via Tailscale Serve.
Java/Spring Boot backend with a set of role agents (Diagnostic, Planning, Evaluation, Teaching, Resource, Tracing) orchestrated for a personalized learning system, plus a Vue web frontend.

Collection of ~12 standalone reference implementations covering MCP tool protocol, A2A multi-agent collaboration, RAG customer support, a self-evolving business-report agent, a coding agent (smartcoder), and domain agents (legal/medical/trading/education)

A conversational image-editing workbench: upload an image, give natural-language edit instructions (optionally with a paint mask), and get versioned results with undo/redo, compare views, and multi-format export, backed by an OpenAI-compatible image-edit API.

Next.js app running a LangGraph.js pipeline that takes one product name, generates buyer-intent search keywords (human-approved), discovers and scores candidate importer companies from web evidence via Qwen Cloud, and drafts (human-approved) first-touch outreach emails into a CRM store.

TypeScript framework for running autonomous agents that broadcast live to Twitch/Kick/YouTube: scene-graph state, a narrative engine that turns agent events into stream commentary, and platform adapters.
Generates typed TypeScript API clients (multiple HTTP libs, reactive layers, mocks) from OpenAPI 3.x specs via CLI or config file.
Low-resource NER pipeline for classical Chinese text that routes examples by difficulty between a BERT model and an LLM, with a reflection/self-training loop and knowledge-base lookups.

PowerShell plugin that turns Claude Code hook events (Stop, PermissionRequest, etc.) into native Windows toast notifications with dedup, quiet-hours, and async forwarding to IM webhooks (WeChat/Telegram/Discord/etc).

A desktop app that spawns multiple real PTY sessions running CLI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, custom shells) into a tabbed workspace wired together by an append-only event bus, with resumable sessions, an ask_human interrupt channel, and an MCP server exposing crew/mission/runner control to other agents.
Multi-agent Texas Hold'em poker platform where LLM-driven players (via LiteLLM, configurable personalities) compete over WebSocket with a real-time web UI and ChromaDB-backed memory.
Streamlit-based Chinese LLM chatbot with a pluggable agent layer that uses function-calling/tools (weather lookup, email send, web search, calculator) across multiple LLM provider backends.

an enterprise smart-home-oriented multi-agent platform (rebranded fork of Bisheng) offering visual workflow orchestration, document/OCR parsing, RBAC/SSO, and a companion 'green internet' MCP service for simulated network management

macOS Alfred launcher workflow giving a chat UI over 6 LLM providers with local-file/Obsidian tool use, long-term memory (Hermes-style MEMORY.md/SOUL.md), session search, conversation rewind, and export to Obsidian notes.

Hybrid local+cloud scanner that statically analyzes third-party agent skill packages for malware/exfiltration/prompt-injection/privilege-abuse behaviors and produces a weighted 0-100 threat score with install-blocking thresholds.
An LLM agent that plans over RESTful APIs via an iterative coarse-to-fine planner, API selector, and executor (with a caller and response parser), evaluated on a TMDB/Spotify benchmark.
